data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Cancellation with retention offers', but the evidence does not confirm this requirement. While the use case mentions a cancellation attempt triggering an offer of 'Stay and get next month 50% off', there is no concrete evidence demonstrating the implementation of this functionality in the API or the system's behavior during cancellation. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not sufficiently support the existence or execution of retention offers upon cancellation.
gaps: No concrete evidence of API behavior or state changes during cancellation with retention offers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add cancellation flow validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that cancellation attempts trigger retention offers as specified.
